message:
chore(gitignore): add flat-file proptest-regressions pattern

The existing **/proptest-regressions/ glob only matches directories.
Add *.proptest-regressions to also catch the flat-file variant that
proptest generates alongside test source files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -91,6 +91,7 @@ triage.json
 
 # Proptest regression files (auto-generated, machine-specific)
 **/proptest-regressions/
+*.proptest-regressions
 
 # TLA+ model checker generated state files (multi-GB, regeneratable)
 docs/formal/states/
